task.objective: Implement AI-powered Root Cause Analysis (RCA) that automatically analyzes test failures and categorizes them as Application Bug, Automation Bug, Environment Issue, or Test Issue
task.framework: Next.js 16 with App Router, Vercel AI SDK, shadcn/ui

existing_patterns.pattern: Database queries use `getQueriesForOrg(organizationId)` wrapper pattern in lib/db.ts
API routes use `export const dynamic = "force-dynamic"` and auth check first
Components use `"use client"`, useState/useEffect for data fetching
Existing `ai_context` JSONB field in test_results table for storing analysis
Test result cards in components/dashboard/test-result-card.tsx for reference

dependencies.dependency: ai (Vercel AI SDK) - for structured output generation
lucide-react - for icons (Brain, Bug, Wrench, Cloud, TestTube)

functional.requirement: Analyze failed tests using AI to determine root cause category
Categories: Application Bug, Automation Bug, Environment Issue, Test Issue, Unknown
Store analysis results in existing ai_context JSONB field
Display RCA badge on failed test cards with category and confidence
Support manual re-analysis trigger from UI
Provide detailed explanation of why the category was assigned
Include suggested fix or next steps based on category
Batch analyze multiple failures for efficiency
Learn from user corrections to improve accuracy

non_functional.requirement: AI API calls should timeout after 30 seconds
Cache analysis results to avoid re-analyzing identical errors
All data must be filtered by organization_id (multi-tenancy)

file.description: Add database functions for RCA storage and retrieval
Create API endpoint for single failure analysis
Create API endpoint for batch failure analysis
Create API endpoint for RCA summary statistics

constraints.avoid: Don't send full stack traces (truncate to 2000 chars) to reduce token usage
Don't re-analyze failures that already have RCA stored
Don't block the UI during analysis - show loading state
constraints.prefer: Use gpt-4o-mini for cost efficiency - gpt-4o only for complex cases
Cache analysis results to avoid redundant API calls
Use Vercel AI SDK's structured output for reliable JSON parsing

output_format.code: Implement each file following the code snippets provided
output_format.explanation: Implementation notes: 1. Ensure OPENAI_API_KEY environment variable is set 2. The AI context field already exists in test_results table (JSONB) 3. RCA results are stored alongside any existing AI context data 4. The badge component can be added to test-result-card.tsx 5. Consider adding rate limiting for batch analysis
